hectaresBurned.note: Estimated hectares burned by wildfires, UK. 2018 peak includes Saddleworth Moor and Llanbadoc fires. 2021 peak driven by Scotland spring fires.

incidents.note: Number of wildfire incidents attended by fire and rescue services, UK. Includes moorland, heath and forestry fires.

fireRiskDays.note: Days per year meeting Met Office fire weather index threshold for high wildfire risk. Projected under RCP4.5 mid-range climate scenario.

sources.name: NFCC
sources.dataset: National Fire Chiefs Council — Wildfire Risk Register and Incident Data

metadata.methodology: Hectares burned from NFCC national incident data, supplemented by satellite analysis for major events. Incident counts from Fire and Rescue Service returns to Home Office and SFRS. Fire risk days from Met Office fire weather index analysis. Climate projections from UKCP18 under RCP4.5 scenario.
knownIssues: Wildfire incident recording is inconsistent across fire services — some small fires are not recorded as separate incidents
Satellite estimates of area burned differ from ground-truth surveys — figures for major events may be revised
Climate projections are scenario-dependent — actual risk days by 2050 depend heavily on emissions trajectories
2018 data includes prolonged Saddleworth fire which distorts that year significantly
